<features>
- animal type: dog
- coat color: black and tan
- ear shape: large, upright/pointed
- body size: small
</features>

<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog AND coat color = black and tan AND body size = small] THEN [21]
- IF [animal type = cat AND coat color = multi-colored/white/grey] THEN [26]
- IF [animal type = dog AND coat color = white AND body size = large] THEN [15]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 21 fires because the Query Image shows a small dog with a black and tan coat and large upright ears, matching the patterns seen in the support images for class 21.
</rule_check>

<response>21</response>
